name: word-racing
description: F1-themed English vocabulary game for kids

scripts.pack: npm run build && cd dist && tar -czf word-racing.tar.gz word-racing && echo 'dist/word-racing.tar.gz created'
scripts.pack:zip: npm run build && cd dist && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path word-racing -DestinationPath word-racing.zip -Force" && echo 'dist/word-racing.zip created'
